narrative:
Precinct Portsmouth 5-C (precinct in Scioto County) has 431 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.9 percentage points.
